  .lc-daily { background: #ff4500; color: #fff; }
  .lc-multi { background: #0a1e3d; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #2a4a6d; }
  .lc-hummel { background: #1a1a1a; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #444; }
  .lc-courir { background: #1a1a1a; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #333; }
  .lc-gosport { background: #0066cc; color: #fff; }
  .lc-nice { background: #c91a6b; color: #fff; }
  .lc-temu { background: #fb6f00; color: #fff; }
  .lc-styli { background: #1a1a1a; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #333; }
  .lc-linzi { background: #c9a961; color: #1a1a1a; }
  .lc-onecard { background: #6c3b9e; color: #fff; }
  .lc-likecard { background: #ff6b35; color: #fff; }
  .lc-igp { background: #d4145a; color: #fff; }
  .lc-fragrance { background: #2d1b4e; color: #c9a961; border: 1px solid #c9a961; }
  .lc-babies { background: #ff8ec8; color: #1a1a1a; }
  .lc-reef { background: #00796b; color: #fff; }
  .lc-food { background: #ff5722; color: #fff; }
  .lc-toyou { background: #7b2d8e; color: #fff; }
  .lc-panel { background: #2e7d32; color: #fff; }
  .lc-yoga { background: #1a1a1a; color: #8cd4b8; border: 1px solid #8cd4b8; }
  .lc-mandoob { background: #ff9800; color: #1a1a1a; }
  .lc-noonmin { background: #f5d318; color: #1a1a1a; }
  .lc-default { background: var(--dark3); color: var(--text-light); border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.1); }

  .logo-chip:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); opacity: 0.9; }

  /* ===== METRIC CARDS ===== */
  .metrics-grid {
    display: grid;
    gap: 14px;
    margin-top: 24px;
  }
  .mg-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
  .mg-3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }

  .mc {
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--dark2), var(--dark3));
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.07);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 22px 20px;
    transition: all 0.25s;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .mc:hover {
    border-color: rgba(99,194,157,0.2);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }
  .mc::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green), transparent);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.25s;
  }
  .mc:hover::after { opacity: 1; }
  .mc-val {
    font-size: 32px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--green);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .mc-title {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 3px;
  }
  .mc-desc {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--text-dim);
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .mc-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(99,194,157,0.08);
    color: var(--green);
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 2px 7px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    margin-top: 6px;
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }

  /* ===== PAIN CARDS ===== */
  .pain-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 16px;
    margin-top: 24px;
  }
  .pc {
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--red-glow), var(--dark2));
    border: 1px solid rgba(232,81,94,0.1);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 24px 22px;
  }
  .pc-who {
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--red);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    background: rgba(232,81,94,0.08);
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .pc-num {
    font-size: 38px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--red);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .pc-title {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .pc-body {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--text-dim);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ===== SOLUTION CARDS ===== */
  .sol-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 16px;
    margin-top: 24px;
  }
  .sc {
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--green-glow2), var(--dark2));
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.08);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 24px 22px;
    transition: border-color 0.25s;
  }
  .sc:hover { border-color: rgba(99,194,157,0.2); }
  .sc-for {
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--green);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .sc-title {
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .sc-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; }
  .sc-list li {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--text);
    line-height: 1.4;
    padding: 4px 0 4px 14px;
    position: relative;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.03);
  }
  .sc-list li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .sc-list li::before {
    content: '→';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    color: var(--green);
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 11px;
  }

  /* ===== BEFORE/AFTER TABLE ===== */
  .ba {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0;
    margin-top: 20px;
    font-size: 13px;
  }
  .ba th {
    padding: 10px 16px;
    text-align: left;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 10px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    border-bottom: 2px solid;
  }
  .ba th:nth-child(1) { color: var(--text-dim); border-color: var(--text-dim); background: var(--dark2); border-radius: 8px 0 0 0; width: 20%; }
  .ba th:nth-child(2) { color: var(--red); border-color: var(--red); background: rgba(232,81,94,0.03); width: 40%; }
  .ba th:nth-child(3) { color: var(--green); border-color: var(--green); background: rgba(99,194,157,0.03); border-radius: 0 8px 0 0; width: 40%; }
  .ba td {
    padding: 9px 16px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.03);
    vertical-align: top;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  .ba td:nth-child(1) { color: var(--text-light); font-weight: 500; font-size: 12px; }
  .ba td:nth-child(2) { color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 12px; }
  .ba td:nth-child(3) { color: var(--text-light); font-size: 12px; }

  /* ===== DASHBOARD MOCKUP ===== */
  .dash-mock {
    background: var(--dark2);
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.12);
    border-radius: 14px;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-top: 20px;
  }
  .dash-topbar {
    background: var(--dark3);
    padding: 10px 18px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.08);
  }
  .dash-dots {
    display: flex;
    gap: 6px;
  }
  .dash-dot {
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    border-radius: 50%;
  }
  .dash-dot.r { background: #e8515e; }
  .dash-dot.y { background: #f0c75e; }
  .dash-dot.g { background: #63c29d; }
  .dash-title-bar {
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--text-dim);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
  }
  .dash-body {
    padding: 18px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .dash-stat {
    background: var(--dark3);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 14px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .dash-stat-val {
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--green);
    margin-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .dash-stat-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text-dim);
  }
  .dash-chart-area {
    padding: 0 18px 18px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .dash-chart {
    background: var(--dark3);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 14px;
    min-height: 120px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .dash-chart-title {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-dim);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .dash-bars {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: 6px;
    height: 80px;
  }
  .dash-bar-item {
    flex: 1;
    border-radius: 3px 3px 0 0;
    min-width: 8px;
  }
  .dash-pie {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-top: 8px;
  }
  .dash-pie-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text);
  }
  .dash-pie-dot {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* ===== QUOTE ===== */
  .quote {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-glow), transparent);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--green);
    padding: 16px 24px;
    border-radius: 0 10px 10px 0;
    margin-top: 20px;
  }
  .quote p {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--text-light);
    line-height: 1.65;
  }

  /* ===== TIMELINE ===== */
  .tl-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 16px;
    margin-top: 24px;
  }
  .tl-card {
    background: var(--dark2);
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.06);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px;
  }
  .tl-card.live { border-color: rgba(99,194,157,0.2); }
  .tl-dot {
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .tl-dot.on { background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(99,194,157,0.4); }
  .tl-dot.off { background: var(--dark3); border: 2px solid var(--green); }
  .tl-phase {
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 9px;
    color: var(--green);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .tl-title {
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .tl-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; }
  .tl-list li {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--text);
    line-height: 1.4;
    padding: 3px 0 3px 12px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .tl-list li::before {
    content: '▸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    color: var(--green);
    font-size: 10px;
  }
  .tl-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 2px 7px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    margin-top: 8px;
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  }
  .tl-badge.live { background: rgba(99,194,157,0.1); color: var(--green); }
  .tl-badge.dev { background: rgba(240,199,94,0.1); color: var(--yellow); }
  .tl-badge.plan { background: rgba(91,155,213,0.1); color: var(--blue); }

  /* ===== VERTICALS ===== */
  .vert-row {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 6px;
    margin-top: 12px;
  }
  .vt {
    background: var(--dark3);
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.06);
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 4px 12px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--text-light);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
  }
  .vt-icon { font-size: 13px; }

  /* ===== MARKET BARS ===== */
  .bar-group { margin-top: 16px; }
  .bar-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .bar-label {
    width: 110px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--text);
    text-align: right;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .bar-track {
    flex: 1;
    height: 24px;
    background: var(--dark3);
    border-radius: 5px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .bar-fill {
    height: 100%;
    border-radius: 5px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding-left: 8px;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--white);
  }
  .bar-fill.green { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green-dark), var(--green)); }
  .bar-fill.dim { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1e3a44, #3a5f6b); }
  .bar-val {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--green);
    width: 44px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  }

  /* ===== FLYWHEEL ===== */
  .fly-wrap {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr;
    gap: 40px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 28px;
  }
  .fly-visual {
    width: 280px;
    height: 280px;
    position: relative;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .fly-ring {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    border: 2px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.12);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: spin 45s linear infinite;
  }
  .fly-ring2 {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 28px;
    border: 1px dashed rgba(99,194,157,0.06);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: spin 65s linear infinite reverse;
  }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
  .fly-ctr {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%; left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    text-align: center;
    z-index: 2;
  }
  .fly-ctr-icon { font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .fly-ctr-text { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--green); }
  .fly-ctr-sub {
    font-size: 9px;
    color: var(--text-dim);
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-top: 1px;
  }
  .fly-node {
    position: absolute;
    text-align: center;
    z-index: 3;
  }
  .fly-node-dot {
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--dark3);
    border: 2px solid var(--green);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 15px;
    margin: 0 auto 4px;
  }
  .fly-node-text {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--text-light);
    line-height: 1.2;
    max-width: 80px;
  }
  .fly-node.n1 { top: -20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); }
  .fly-node.n2 { top: 50%; right: -36px; transform: translateY(-50%); }
  .fly-node.n3 { bottom: -20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); }
  .fly-node.n4 { top: 50%; left: -36px; transform: translateY(-50%); }

  .fly-stats {
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 16px;
  }
  .fly-stat {
    background: var(--dark2);
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.06);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 12px 14px;
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .fly-stat-v {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--green);
    margin-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .fly-stat-l {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text-dim);
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  /* ===== FOUNDER ===== */
  .founder-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 260px 1fr;
    gap: 40px;
    margin-top: 28px;
    align-items: start;
  }
  .founder-photo {
    width: 260px;
    height: 300px;
    border-radius: 16px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--dark3), var(--dark4));
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.12);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 24px;
  }
  .founder-avatar {
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-dark), var(--green));
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 36px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--dark);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .founder-name {
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .founder-role {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--green);
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .founder-loc {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--text-dim);
    margin-top: 8px;
  }
  .founder-exp {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 6px;
    margin-top: 16px;
  }
  .founder-exp-chip {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 500;
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    background: var(--dark2);
    color: var(--text-light);
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.08);
  }
  .founder-insight {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-glow), transparent);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--green);
    padding: 16px 20px;
    border-radius: 0 10px 10px 0;
    margin-top: 20px;
  }
  .founder-insight p {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--text-light);
    line-height: 1.65;
  }

  /* ===== NAV ===== */
  .nav {
    position: fixed;
    right: 18px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 7px;
    z-index: 100;
  }
  .nav a {
    display: block;
    width: 7px;
    height: 7px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(99,194,157,0.12);
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.2);
    transition: all 0.25s;
  }
  .nav a:hover { background: var(--green); transform: scale(1.4); }

  /* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
  @media (max-width: 1100px) {
    .slide { padding: 40px 32px; }
    .mega { font-size: 38px; letter-spacing: -1px; }
    .h1 { font-size: 30px; }
    .metrics-grid.mg-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .pain-grid, .sol-grid, .tl-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .fly-wrap, .founder-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .fly-visual { margin: 0 auto; }
    .product-flow { flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; }
    .dash-body { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .dash-chart-area { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .slide-hdr { left: 32px; right: 32px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="nav">
  <a href="#s1" title="Title"></a>
  <a href="#s2" title="Founder"></a>
  <a href="#s3" title="Problem"></a>
  <a href="#s4" title="Solution"></a>
  <a href="#s5" title="Platform"></a>
  <a href="#s6" title="Traction"></a>
  <a href="#s7" title="Market"></a>
</div>

High friction to scale. No clarity. No trust.
Everyone Misses Out
2%
Of $18B global affiliate value — despite 15% e-commerce growth
MENA's e-commerce is surging at 15% annually — faster than North America or Europe. Yet affiliate marketing captures barely 2% of global value.

Agencies deliver generic campaigns with weak measurement. No specialized ecosystem exists.

Massive growth. Zero infrastructure. Huge opportunity.

Brands waste budget on inflated customer acquisition costs. Publishers struggle with payment reliability and campaign opacity. The result? An $18 billion global industry where MENA captures barely 2% of value despite having some of the highest e-commerce growth rates on earth. This structural inefficiency is Perff AI's opportunity.

  }
  .nav-logo svg { height: 30px; }
  .nav-links {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px;
  }
  .nav-link {
    font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-dim);
    transition: color 0.2s; cursor: pointer;
  }
  .nav-link:hover { color: var(--white); }
  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--green); color: var(--dark);
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px;
    padding: 10px 24px; border-radius: 8px;
    cursor: pointer; border: none;
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--green-light); transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .nav-menu-btn {
    display: none; background: none; border: none;
    color: var(--white); font-size: 24px; cursor: pointer;
  }

  /* ===== HERO ===== */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 120px 48px 80px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, rgba(99,194,157,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, rgba(99,194,157,0.03) 0%, transparent 50%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, rgba(99,194,157,0.03) 0%, transparent 50%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  /* Floating particles */
  .hero::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    width: 400px; height: 400px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.04);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: -100px; right: -100px;
    animation: float 20s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes float {
    0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
    50% { transform: translate(-30px, 30px) rotate(180deg); }
  }

  .hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 860px; }
  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(99,194,157,0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.15);
    border-radius: 40px;
    padding: 8px 20px;
    font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--green);
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }
  .hero-badge-dot {
    width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--green);
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.5); }
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-size: 64px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1.08; letter-spacing: -2.5px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .hero-title .accent { color: var(--green); }
  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--text-light);
    font-weight: 300; max-width: 680px; margin: 0 auto 36px;
  }

  .hero-ctas {
    display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--green); color: var(--dark);
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px;
    padding: 16px 36px; border-radius: 12px;
    cursor: pointer; border: none;
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
    transition: all 0.25s;
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--green-light); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(99,194,157,0.2); }
  .btn-secondary {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.2);
    color: var(--green); font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px;
    padding: 16px 36px; border-radius: 12px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
    transition: all 0.25s;
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  }
  .btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--green); background: rgba(99,194,157,0.05); transform: translateY(-2px); }

  .hero-stats {
    display: flex; gap: 40px; justify-content: center;
    margin-top: 56px; flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .hero-stat { text-align: center; }
  .hero-stat-val {
    font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .hero-stat-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); }

  /* ===== SECTION SHARED ===== */
  .section {
    padding: 100px 48px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .section-inner {
    max-width: 1140px; margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .section-kicker {
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px; color: var(--green);
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 4px;
    font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-size: 42px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -1.2px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .section-sub {
    font-size: 17px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.7;
    max-width: 600px;
  }
  .accent { color: var(--green); }
  .bold { font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); }

  /* ===== TRUSTED BY ===== */
  .trusted {
    padding: 48px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.04);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.04);
    background: var(--dark2);
  }
  .trusted-inner {
    max-width: 1140px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center;
  }
  .trusted-label {
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-dim);
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .trusted-logos {
    display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0; justify-content: center;
  }
  .tl {
    padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-dim); white-space: nowrap;
    transition: color 0.2s; position: relative;
  }
  .tl::after {
    content: '·'; position: absolute; right: -3px;
    color: rgba(99,194,157,0.12);
  }
  .tl:last-child::after { content: ''; }
  .tl:hover { color: var(--text-light); }
  .tl.top { color: var(--text-light); }

  /* ===== HOW IT WORKS ===== */
  .hiw-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
    gap: 0; margin-top: 48px; align-items: center;
  }
  .hiw-step {
    text-align: center; padding: 0 12px;
  }
  .hiw-icon {
    width: 72px; height: 72px; border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 30px; margin: 0 auto 14px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .hiw-icon.side {
    background: rgba(99,194,157,0.06);
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.12);
  }
  .hiw-icon.center {
    background: var(--green); border: 2px solid var(--green-light);
    box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(99,194,157,0.15);
  }
  .hiw-label { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .hiw-desc { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.5; }
  .hiw-arrow {
    text-align: center; font-size: 24px; color: var(--green);
    padding-bottom: 30px;
  }

  /* ===== FEATURES GRID ===== */
  .feat-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 20px; margin-top: 48px;
  }
  .feat {
    background: var(--dark2);
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.06);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 32px 28px;
    transition: all 0.25s;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .feat:hover {
    border-color: rgba(99,194,157,0.18);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }
  .feat::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green), transparent);
    opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.25s;
  }
  .feat:hover::after { opacity: 1; }
  .feat-icon { font-size: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .feat-title {
    font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 10px; line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .feat-body {
    font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.65;
  }

  /* ===== FOR BRANDS / PUBLISHERS ===== */
  .split {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 0;
  }
  .split-panel {
    padding: 80px 60px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .split-panel.brand-panel {
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(99,194,157,0.04), var(--dark2));
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.06);
  }
  .split-panel.pub-panel {
    background: var(--dark2);
  }
  .split-kicker {
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--green);
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .split-title {
    font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .split-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin-bottom: 28px; }
  .split-list li {
    font-size: 15px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.5;
    padding: 8px 0 8px 20px; position: relative;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.03);
  }
  .split-list li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .split-list li::before {
    content: '→'; position: absolute; left: 0;
    color: var(--green); font-weight: 600;
  }
  .split-result {
    background: var(--dark3); border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 16px 20px; margin-bottom: 24px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  }
  .split-result-val {
    font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green);
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  }
  .split-result-label { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-dim); }
  .btn-split {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
    transition: all 0.25s; border: none;
  }
  .btn-split.brand-btn {
    background: var(--green); color: var(--dark);
  }
  .btn-split.brand-btn:hover { background: var(--green-light); }
  .btn-split.pub-btn {
    background: transparent; color: var(--green);
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.2);
  }
  .btn-split.pub-btn:hover { border-color: var(--green); background: rgba(99,194,157,0.05); }

  /* ===== NUMBERS SECTION ===== */
  .numbers {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(99,194,157,0.06), var(--dark2));
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.08);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.08);
  }
  .numbers-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);
    gap: 20px; margin-top: 48px;
  }
  .num-card {
    text-align: center; padding: 24px 16px;
    background: var(--dark2);
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.06);
    border-radius: 14px;
    transition: all 0.25s;
  }
  .num-card:hover {
    border-color: rgba(99,194,157,0.18);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
  }
  .num-val {
    font-size: 36px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green);
    line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .num-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .num-badge {
    display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600;
    background: rgba(99,194,157,0.08); color: var(--green);
    padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px;
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; margin-top: 4px;
  }

  /* ===== AI SECTION ===== */
  .ai-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 20px; margin-top: 48px;
  }
  .ai-card {
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--green-glow), var(--dark2));
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.12);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 32px 28px;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    transition: all 0.25s;
  }
  .ai-card:hover { border-color: rgba(99,194,157,0.25); transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .ai-card::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green), var(--green-light), transparent);
  }
  .ai-icon { font-size: 28px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
  .ai-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 10px; line-height: 1.3; }
  .ai-body { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.65; }

  /* ===== TESTIMONIAL ===== */
  .test-section {
    background: var(--dark2);
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.04);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.04);
  }
  .test-card {
    max-width: 700px; margin: 48px auto 0;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .test-quote {
    font-size: 22px; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-light);
    line-height: 1.7; font-style: italic;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .test-author { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); }
  .test-role { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 2px; }

  /* ===== FINAL CTA ===== */
  .cta-section {
    text-align: center;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--dark), var(--dark2));
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .cta-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(99,194,157,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .cta-box {
    max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto;
    position: relative; z-index: 2;
  }
  .cta-title {
    font-size: 48px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -1.5px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .cta-sub {
    font-size: 18px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 36px;
  }

  /* Email Form */
  .email-form {
    display: flex; gap: 12px; justify-content: center;
    max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto 20px;
  }
  .email-input {
    flex: 1; padding: 16px 20px;
    background: var(--dark3);
    border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.12);
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-size: 15px; color: var(--white);
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
    outline: none;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .email-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-dim); }
  .email-input:focus { border-color: var(--green); }
  .email-submit {
    padding: 16px 28px;
    background: var(--green); color: var(--dark);
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;
    border: none; border-radius: 12px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
    transition: all 0.25s;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .email-submit:hover { background: var(--green-light); }
  .form-note {
    font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 8px;
  }

  /* ===== FOOTER ===== */
  .footer {
    background: var(--dark2);
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.06);
    padding: 60px 48px 32px;
  }
  .footer-inner {
    max-width: 1140px; margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 40px;
  }
  .footer-brand svg { height: 28px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .footer-desc { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.6; max-width: 280px; }
  .footer-social {
    display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 16px;
  }
  .footer-social a {
    width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px;
    background: var(--dark3); border: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.06);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 16px; color: var(--text-dim);
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .footer-social a:hover { border-color: rgba(99,194,157,0.2); color: var(--green); }
  .footer-heading {
    font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white);
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .footer-links { list-style: none; }
  .footer-links li { margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .footer-links a {
    font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-dim); transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--green); }
  .footer-bottom {
    max-width: 1140px; margin: 40px auto 0;
    padding-top: 24px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(99,194,157,0.04);
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between;
    font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim);
  }

  /* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
  @media (max-width: 1000px) {
    .nav { padding: 0 24px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .nav-menu-btn { display: block; }
    .hero { padding: 120px 24px 60px; }
    .hero-title { font-size: 36px; letter-spacing: -1px; }
    .hero-sub { font-size: 16px; }
    .section { padding: 60px 24px; }
    .section-title { font-size: 28px; }
    .hiw-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 16px; }
    .hiw-arrow { transform: rotate(90deg); padding: 0; }
    .feat-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .split { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .split-panel { padding: 48px 24px; }
    .numbers-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
    .ai-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .cta-title { font-size: 32px; }
    .email-form { flex-direction: column; }
    .footer-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .footer-bottom { flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
    .hero-stats { gap: 24px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

    </svg>
  </div>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a class="nav-link" href="#how">How It Works</a>
    <a class="nav-link" href="#brands">For Brands</a>
    <a class="nav-link" href="#publishers">For Publishers</a>
